patterns_recognized: SEA@HOU OVERRIDE validated 2-for-2 in archive (05-11 Kirby 3-1, 05-12 Woo 10-2); fair_prob < 0.35 + 3 stacked flags + confirmed elite SP (Castillo today) mandates OVERRIDE again.
Extreme f5_full_delta (>0.25) + stacked pipeline flags reliably triggers correct OVERRIDE to the F5-favored side; DET@NYM 05-12 was 10-2 with delta=0.3285, today's 0.2931 is nearly identical.
HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) is 4-for-5 in archive; single miss was magnitude-disagreement-only where market and model agreed on direction — enforce without exception.
F1_xera_gap with asterisk (*) as sole signal is unreliable; GOLD CONFIRM requires PQI or F2/F3 as backup — PHI@BOS today has F1* backed by PQI, satisfying Hard Cap 5.
model_prob outside [0.48, 0.72] or > 0.85 on SF@LAD or high-delta games is a pipeline calibration artifact — SKIP is always correct regardless of F-signal magnitude.

COL @ PIT.reasoning: F3=3579.3 (slate's largest swing-take gap) is a genuine directional signal for PIT. However, fair_prob is missing — the Odds API did not fire — so the pipeline correctly caps the grade at C and zeroes the stake per market-validation requirement. No SP concern (Chase Dollander experienced). PIT's home lineup concentration of 0.97 (ultra-balanced, bottom order equals top) is a structural positive. Cannot elevate beyond SKIP without a market anchor.

WSH @ CIN.reasoning: D grade (-2) correctly assigned: no active F-signals, SP edge 0.92 xERA against WSH pick (Chase Burns starting for CIN — one of NL's better young arms), PQI against WSH (Δ=+17.0). Fair_prob missing prevents edge calculation. The model barely favors WSH at 50.89% with zero structural support. CIN as home team with Burns provides no basis for a WSH directional conviction. SKIP is the only sound tier.

DET @ NYM.reasoning: OVERRIDE to NYM. f5_full_delta=0.2931 nearly matches the 05-12 DET@NYM record (0.3285) that produced a 10-2 OVERRIDE win. Nolan McLean's projected F5 dominance is extreme (f5_prob=0.754 → NYM wins F5 at 75.4%). Two stacked flags: acute_roster=True + confidence_downgrade=True. SP edge -0.99 xERA AGAINST DET; PQI AGAINST DET (Δ=+17.1). Market prices DET at only 46.09%. OVERRIDE to NYM is fully supported by the 05-12 analogy.

MIA @ MIN.reasoning: Both probable pitchers — Zebby Matthews (MIN) and Braxton Garrett (MIA) — have 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date per the model. Live API confirms both are slated but neither has 2026 pitch data to score. Prior postgames (05-10, 05-12) confirm PENDING is the correct call when SP quality cannot be quantified. No directional pick warranted.

SD @ MIL.reasoning: No active F-signals. Fair_prob missing, no edge computed. PQI against SD pick (Δ=+3.4). MIL's Kyle Harrison is a quality home SP. SD lineup concentration of 1.011 (near-perfectly balanced) is a modest positive but insufficient for a zero-signal pick. C grade with zero stake is correct. f5_full_delta=0.1092 is moderate with no structural elevation of conviction.

SEA @ HOU.reasoning: All four OVERRIDE conditions converge for the third consecutive SEA@HOU game: fair_prob=0.1693 (market has HOU at only 17%, SEA at 83%), three stacked flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade=True), Luis Castillo confirmed as SEA starter (elite SP), and HARD CAP 6 firing at 48.11pp (calibration hallucination). Pattern is 2-for-2 in archive. SEA direction is the affirmative call — not just a DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

STL @ OAK.reasoning: Edge=+3.79pp falls just below the 4pp band minimum — correctly excluded. D grade (-2): SP edge 1.71 xERA against STL (Jacob Lopez projects better than McGreevy), PQI against STL (Δ=+23.2). Stage 1 gives OAK the F5 edge (OAK wins F5 at 56.05%), Stage 2 barely picks STL at 50.93%. Market has STL at 47.14%. Borderline coin-flip with multiple negative structural signals; SKIP is correct.

PHI @ BOS.reasoning: F1_xera_gap=0.93* (small-sample asterisk) is backed by PQI confirming PHI (Δ=-7.9), satisfying Hard Cap 5's secondary-signal requirement. Edge=+5.6pp within [4,15]pp band. f5_full_delta=0.1189 is below the 0.15 concern threshold. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0109 slightly favors PHI's high-leverage relief. No stacked flags, confidence_downgrade=False. Luzardo vs Suarez at Fenway. B+ grade with positive edge and clean signals warrants CONFIRM.

CHC @ ATL.reasoning: Edge=-12.86pp is outside the [4,15]pp band — stake correctly zeroed. Market prices ATL at 63.93% while model has them at only 51.08%; market is significantly more bullish on ATL (30-13 record, Chris Sale starting). F3=1518.9 fires but SP edge 0.49 xERA against ATL pick (Ben Brown projects slightly better than Sale per model this season). ATL direction is likely right per market pricing, but no staking opportunity exists at this edge level.

KC @ CHW.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fires: edge=-5.67pp (market prices KC at 56.55%, model at 50.88%), demoting pre-cap A- to B-. f5_full_delta=0.2433 is large — KC dominates F5 at 75.21% via Bubic but barely wins the full game at 50.88%, meaning the bullpen-carry thesis is required and fragile. F1=2.97 and F3=2313.3 are strong signals but Hard Cap correctly prevents GOLD staking on negative-EV odds. Treat as SKIP for staking purposes.

SF @ LAD.reasoning: model_prob=0.7588 is outside the valid [0.48, 0.72] range — pipeline correctly SKIPs. D grade (-4): SP edge 1.60 xERA against LAD (Landen Roupp projects over Emmet Sheehan), PQI against LAD (Δ=-13.6), f5_full_delta=0.3097. OVERRIDE conditions are NOT met: no stacked pipeline flags (confidence_downgrade=False, no acute_roster), and market agrees with LAD winning (fair_prob=0.638). Large f5_full_delta alone without flags and fair_prob warning does not trigger OVERRIDE per 05-11/05-12 protocol.
